narrative:
Bryan City has 5,485 registered voters, with 59.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.4 percentage points.
